nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Docker build for the backend Node.js API, installing production dependencies on a node:18-alpine base image and starting the server with npm start on port 5001.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-stage build (no multi-stage separation of build vs runtime layers); relies on `npm install --production` to keep the image lean instead.

nodes.name: node
nodes.summary: The sole build stage, based on node:18-alpine, that copies package manifests, installs production dependencies, copies the rest of the backend source, and exposes port 5001 for the API server.
